title: citrus × aurantium subf. dulcis
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. dulcis, also known as bitter orange or sweet orange, is a hybrid citrus plant that is widely cultivated for its fruit and essential oils. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. dulcis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, essential oil, or extract, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and improve overall well-being.
